adventure-one-shot-template.rdfs:label: One-Shot Adventure Template
adventure-one-shot-template.schema:title: One-Shot Adventure Title
adventure-one-shot-template.schema:description: A single-session adventure with one location and 1-2 encounters.

adv:hasPart.rdfs:label: Chapter 1: Opening Scene
adv:hasPart.schema:description: Hook the party and establish the central conflict.

adv:hasLocation.rdfs:label: Location Name
adv:hasLocation.schema:name: Location Name
adv:hasLocation.schema:description: Detailed description of the location including atmosphere and key features.

adv:hasEncounter.rdfs:label: Example Combat Encounter
adv:hasEncounter.schema:description: Description of what happens in this encounter.

adventure-multi-chapter-template.rdfs:label: Multi-Chapter Campaign Template
adventure-multi-chapter-template.schema:title: Multi-Chapter Adventure Title
adventure-multi-chapter-template.schema:description: A linked series of chapters across multiple sessions.

adv:hasPart.rdfs:label: Chapter 2: Escalation
adv:hasPart.schema:description: Raise stakes and complicate the plot.

adv:hasNPC.rdfs:label: Villain
adv:hasNPC.schema:name: Villain Name
adv:hasNPC.schema:description: The main antagonist and their goals.

adv:hasNPC.rdfs:label: Key Ally
adv:hasNPC.schema:name: Ally Name
adv:hasNPC.schema:description: An important ally to the party.

encounter-block-template.rdfs:label: Combat Encounter
encounter-block-template.schema:name: Encounter Name
encounter-block-template.schema:description: What is at stake? What's the situation?

adv:hasMonster.schema:name: Antagonist Name
adv:hasMonster.schema:description: Type, archetype, and role in combat

encounter-block-template.adv:developments: What changes during combat? Reinforcements? Environmental shifts?

location-block-template.rdfs:label: Location Name
location-block-template.schema:name: Location Name
location-block-template.schema:description: Overall atmosphere, size, who controls it.

adv:hasArea.schema:description: What is in this sub-area? What can the party do here?
